env.name: KAYZEN_USERNAME
env.label: KAYZEN_USERNAME
env.description: Kayzen username or email. Required unless KAYZEN_BASIC_AUTH is used.

env.name: KAYZEN_PASSWORD
env.label: KAYZEN_PASSWORD
env.description: Kayzen password. Required unless KAYZEN_BASIC_AUTH is used.

env.name: KAYZEN_BASIC_AUTH
env.label: KAYZEN_BASIC_AUTH
env.description: Optional precomputed basic auth token. If provided, username/password can be left empty.

postInstallMessage: Reopen Claude Desktop to load the MCP server
